title: Cinematic Guide Engine
description: Implemented a high-performance SlidePlayer component featuring image preloading, theater mode, and dynamic onboarding pipelines.

title: Canvas Critter Integration
description: Successfully migrated Canvas Critter to the platform suite with COMP 380 rebranding and polished glassmorphism UI.

title: Automated Updates Module
description: Launched a new homepage 'Updates' feed powered by an agentic workflow to keep instructors informed of platform changes.

title: Infrastructure & QTI Fixes
description: Hardened deployment pipelines to safeguard hosted assets and resolved critical backend execution errors in the QTI export engine.

title: Agentic Updates Workflow
description: Introduced a new AI-powered workflow to automatically generate and display platform updates.

title: Bug Fixes & UI Enhancements
description: Resolved a critical issue with the QTI export endpoint and polished the homepage featured cards.

title: Dynamic Model Selection
description: Added dynamic Gemini model selection for improved performance and rate limit management.
